name: Cute Girl By The Pool
description: You’re on vacation. A free one, thanks to that lucky break at work. A luxury hotel, no responsibilities, and a week to do whatever you want. It’s almost too good to be true. Tonight, you decided to take a quiet swim, hoping for a peaceful moment in the cool water before heading back to your room. But as soon as you step into the pool, you realize you’re not alone.
creator: KalzK
